description_long: This hammer features a long, straight handle with a dark, matte finish, likely made of wood or a composite material. The handle is attached to a large, rectangular head that is solid and blocky, resembling a sledgehammer design. The head is robust and appears to be made of dense metal, with a uniform, dark coloration and no visible striking face details or claws. The base of the handle is firmly embedded into the center of the head, suggesting a secure and durable construction. There are no visible markings, logos, or decorative elements on either the handle or the head. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with no signs of wear, damage, or additional accessories.
description: A heavy-duty hammer with a straight, dark handle and a large, rectangular metal head, resembling a sledgehammer. The design is simple, robust, and unadorned.
description_view_0: Front view showing the straight handle centered on a solid, rectangular head with a flat face.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness and blocky profile of the hammer's head.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the handle centered and the head's flat back visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the head's rectangular block shape and the handle's attachment.
attribute_handle_type: straight wooden handle with a dark matte finish, smooth and cylindrical with no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: rectangular sledgehammer head, solid and blocky with flat striking faces and no claws or peen
